{{Infobox character
| name = Azea Farstrider
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
| name = Azea Farstrider
| aliases = Azea
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = twin head of the Witness Guild, twin Head of the Guild of Witnesses, one of the twin Witnesses
| affiliations = Witness Guild, Guild of Witnesses
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Azea Farstrider is one of the twin leaders of the [[Witness Guild]], serving alongside her sister, Calazan. An [[Izyrian]], she is described as a tall, wiry young woman with pale hair and an identical appearance to her sister. The two sisters are known for their intense, unblinking stares and often act in unison, leading to theories that they may share a single soul or have linked their minds through supernatural means. As Witnesses, they frequently carry candles at their waists and maintain a silent, observant presence during significant events, appearing to memorize details for future reports.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Azea is a twin head of the [[Witness Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Azea Farstrider]] is a twin Head of the [[Guild of Witnesses]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Azea is an [[Izyrian]] twin with pale hair and wide, unblinking stares.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Azea watched the combat between [[Champions]] and [[Soulbound]] without panic.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Azea Farstrider]] is one of the twin Witnesses.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Witness Guild]]
[[Category:Guild of Witnesses]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Soulbound]]
